name: fix-director-gate-confirm
title: Frontend not sending confirm signal at director gate (run timeout)
description: Run 47 stalled 30 min at director approval gate then timed out. Backend interrupt(__interrupt__ gate=director) waits via _wait_for_confirm; frontend never sent confirm via WS or POST /api/v1/projects/{id}/confirm. Investigate frontend gate UI rendering, confirm button binding, useWebSocket handlers in frontend/app/ for the script_approval / director gate. End-to-end auto mode works (verified run 48), so issue is purely in frontend confirm path.
creator: c
